item.text: I’m going to scan `crates/*/src` for every `RefName::new` occurrence, then classify each hit as function-value usage vs direct call, and return strict JSON with both included and excluded locations.
I found three clear `.map(RefName::new)` candidates and several direct-call sites; next I’m verifying which ones are in production code versus test modules before finalizing the lists.

   252	
   253	fn parse_ref_name(ref_name: Option<String>) -> Result<Option<RefName>, OrbitError> {
   254	    ref_name
   255	        .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
   256	        .map(RefName::new)
   257	        .transpose()
   258	        .map_err(|error| OrbitError::InvalidInput(error.to_string()))
   259	}
   260	
   261	fn node_context_to_json(
   262	    svc: &GraphContextService<'_>,
   263	    ctx: &orbit_knowledge::service::NodeContext<'_>,
   264	) -> serde_json::Value {
   265	    let node = ctx.node;
   266	
   267	    let lineage: Vec<String> = ctx
   268	        .lineage
   269	        .iter()
   270	        .map(|n| svc.selector_for_node(*n))
